PRODUCT_VARIANTS_UPDATE_USE_DEDICATED_EN: Use the dedicated variant endpoints to add, update, or delete variants
VARIANT_SKU_ALREADY_EXISTS: Variant SKU already exists for this product
VARIANT_SKU_PATH_BODY_MISMATCH: Variant SKU in path and body must match
PRODUCT_REQUIRES_AT_LEAST_ONE_VARIANT: A product must have at least one variant
PARENT_CATEGORY_NOT_FOUND_OR_DELETED: Parent category not found or has been deleted
CATEGORY_CANNOT_BE_OWN_PARENT: A category cannot be its own parent
CATEGORY_CIRCULAR_HIERARCHY: Invalid parent category: circular hierarchy detected
CATEGORY_HAS_CHILDREN: Cannot delete category because it has child categories. Reassign or delete them first
CATEGORY_HAS_PRODUCTS: Cannot delete category because products are assigned to it. Reassign or delete those products first
OTP_SENT_SUCCESSFULLY: A new OTP has been sent to your email.
PASSWORD_RESET_CODE_SENT: If an account is associated with this email, a reset code has been sent.
PASSWORD_RESET_SUCCESSFULLY: Your password has been reset successfully. You can now login with your new password.
PASSWORD_CHANGED_LOGIN_AGAIN: Password changed successfully. Please log in again.
EMAIL_REGISTERED_NOT_VERIFIED_OTP_SENT: Email registered but not verified. A new OTP has been sent.
EMAIL_NOT_VERIFIED_LOGIN: Email not verified. Please verify your email to login.
TOKENS_DO_NOT_BELONG_TO_CURRENT_USER: Tokens do not belong to the current user
NEW_PASSWORD_MUST_BE_DIFFERENT: New password must be different from the current password
ADMINS_CAN_UPDATE_LIMITED_USERS: Admins can update only seller, customer, or support users
UPDATE_OWN_PROFILE_ONLY: You can update only your own profile
CANNOT_CHANGE_OWN_ROLE: You cannot change your own role
NOT_ALLOWED_TO_UPDATE_USER_ROLES: You are not allowed to update user roles
ADMINS_CANNOT_CHANGE_ADMIN_ROLES: Admins cannot change the role of admin or super admin users
ADMINS_CAN_ASSIGN_LIMITED_ROLES: Admins can assign only seller, customer, or support roles
ONLY_SUPER_ADMIN_CAN_ASSIGN_SUPER_ADMIN: Only the super admin can assign the super admin role
ONLY_ONE_SUPER_ADMIN_ALLOWED: Only one super admin is allowed
ONLY_SUPER_ADMIN_CAN_MANAGE_SUPER_ADMIN: Only the super admin can manage the super admin account
MAX_ADDRESSES_ALLOWED: Maximum of 10 addresses allowed. Please delete an old address first.
ADDRESS_NOT_FOUND: Address not found at the specified index.
REVIEW_OWN_PRODUCTS_ONLY: You can only review products that you have purchased and received.
REVIEW_ALREADY_EXISTS: You have already reviewed this product.
EDIT_OWN_REVIEWS_ONLY: You can only edit your own reviews
DELETE_OWN_REVIEWS_ONLY: You can only delete your own reviews
ORDER_CANCELLED_INVENTORY_RELEASED_SUCCE: Order cancelled and inventory released successfully
ORDER_STATUS_UPDATED_SUCCESSFULLY_BY_ADM: Order status updated successfully by Admin
ORDER_NOT_FOUND_OR_NO_PERMISSION: Order not found or you do not have permission to view it
NO_ORDERS_FOUND_FOR_CHECKOUT_BATCH: No orders found for checkout batch.
CHECKOUT_BATCH_MISSING_TRANSACTION_DATA: Checkout batch is missing transaction data.
CHECKOUT_BATCH_TRANSACTION_HAS_NO_IDENTI: Checkout batch transaction has no identifier.
INVALID_SHIPPING_OR_BILLING_ADDRESS_INDE: Invalid shipping or billing address index. Address does not exist.
PAYMENT_CAPTURED_ORDER_REVIEW: Payment was captured, but order finalization needs manual review.
PAYMENT_GATEWAY_UNREACHABLE: Checkout failed because the payment gateway is unreachable. Inventory released.
INVALID_ORDER_STATUS_TRANSITION: Cannot change order status from {current_status} to {next_status}.
NO_PERMISSION_MANAGE_ORDER: You do not have permission to manage this order.
NO_PERMISSION_CANCEL_ORDER: You do not have permission to cancel this order.
ORDER_CANNOT_BE_CANCELLED: This order can no longer be cancelled.
ORDER_FINALIZING_RETRY_CANCELLATION: Order is currently finalizing. Please retry cancellation in a few moments.
INVOICE_NOT_FOUND_FOR_ORDER: Invoice not found for this order.
NO_PERMISSION_VIEW_INVOICE: You do not have permission to view this invoice.
SELLERS_CAN_ONLY_ACCESS_OWN_INVENTORY: Sellers can only access their own inventory.
SELLER_ID_REQUIRED_FOR_ADMIN_INVENTORY_A: seller_id query parameter is required for admin inventory access.
SELLERS_CAN_ONLY_MUTATE_OWN_INVENTORY: Sellers can only mutate their own inventory.
SELLER_ID_REQUIRED_FOR_ADMIN_INVENTORY_M: seller_id query parameter is required for admin inventory mutation.
INVENTORY_UPDATE_FAILED: Inventory update failed. Check product, SKU, ownership, or available stock.
INVENTORY_SKU_SNAPSHOT_UNAVAILABLE: Inventory update failed because matching SKU snapshot was unavailable.
INVENTORY_NEGATIVE_STOCK: Inventory update failed because resulting stock would be negative.
DUPLICATE_IDEMPOTENCY_KEY_NO_RECORD: Duplicate idempotency key detected, but no matching prior record was found.
IDEMPOTENCY_KEY_PAYLOAD_MISMATCH: Idempotency key has already been used with a different payload.
STOCK_RESTORE_FAILED: Stock restore failed (variant or product not found)
